project.name: TILDA - Barriers
project.description: TILDA processes barriers to cycling from OpenStreetMap data including major roads, railways, waterways, and large areas that impede bicycle movement.

tags.description: Identifies large water bodies as area barriers to cycling.
Identifies airports as area barriers to cycling.
Motorways are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Motorway on and off ramps are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Trunk roads are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Trunk road links are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Rivers are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Canals are treated as linear barriers to cycling.
Railway lines are treated as linear barriers when usage is main or branch.
Light rail lines are treated as linear barriers when usage is main or branch.
Identifies main railway lines used together with railway tag for barrier processing.
Identifies branch railway lines used together with railway tag for barrier processing.
